final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: food photography, editorial close-up
Primary request: close-up of tonkotsu ramen with chopsticks lifting noodles, steam rising, appetizing presentation
Scene/backdrop: shallow depth of field, blurred rustic wooden table surface, bokeh background
Subject: rich creamy tonkotsu broth, chashu pork slices, soft-boiled egg with runny yolk, nori sheets, sliced scallions, wheat noodles being lifted by wooden chopsticks
Style/medium: food photography, macro lens aesthetic, editorial style
Composition/framing: close-up overhead angle, shallow depth of field, focus on the lifted noodles and toppings
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light from the side, warm and inviting, highlighting steam and broth sheen
Color palette: creamy white broth, caramel chashu, golden egg yolk, deep green nori, bright green scallions, warm wood tones
Materials/textures: glossy broth surface, tender meat fibers, silky egg yolk, crisp nori, chewy noodle strands, rising steam wisps
Constraints: keep all toppings clearly visible, emphasize steam and appetizing quality
Avoid: plastic-looking food, artificial colors, over-saturated processing, watermark
